description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the hashicorp/packer:1.0.4 Docker image with a custom entrypoint of /usr/bin/env and PATH set, and runs `packer --version` in a global before_script. Define two stages: validate and deploy. In the validate stage add a `validate` job that executes `find . -maxdepth 1 -name '*.json' -print0 | xargs -t0n1 packer validate`. In the deploy stage add a `build` job that runs in the production environment, is limited to the master branch, requires manual execution, and runs `find . -maxdepth 1 -name '*.json' -print0 | xargs -t0n1 packer build`.
